title: Origin Fairness, Politeness, Retries, Backoff, and p-limit · Inference Brief: Retry Classification

Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Retry only classified transient and idempotent cases with attempt, elapsed, and owner budgets.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Retry Classification model · Theory Retry Classi…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Every non-200 response should be retried.
